STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.descr:
[font_size=18]Modifies damage dealt and taken. There are 5 levels of Distance. (Treated as 3 if none is applied)
1) Very Close: +100%.
2) Close: +50%.
3) Normal: +0% (Default).
4) Far: -15%.
5) Very Far: -30%.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.smart:
Distance [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
Modifies damage dealt and taken by {Amount:choose(1|2|3|4):+100%|+50%|+0%|−15%|−30%}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.title: Distance
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLEXIBLE_WORK_SCHEDU: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold].
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HARDWORKING_SHINIGAM: At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] in [gold]Hand[/gold], add 1 into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

At the start of your turn, if there {Amount:plural:is no|are less than [blue]{Amount}[/blue]} [gold]Manipulate Distances[/gold] in [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold]|[gold]Manipulate Distances[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold]{Amount:plural:.| until there are [blue]{Amount}[/blue].}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLOW_OF_THE_SANZU_RI:
Whenever an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold]:
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] increased, gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] decreased, gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL_POWER.sm:
At the start of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]-{Amount}[/blue].
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]+{Amount}[/blue].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOD_OF_DEATH_POWER.s:
Whenever an enemy dies, if it was a [gold]Minion[/gold], [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. Otherwise, Heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
{HasRevived:choose(0):The next time {OwnerName}'s HP would be reduced to 0, instead, heal to 50% of Max HP, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold], then remove the first played [gold]God of Death[/gold] from your [gold]Deck[/gold].|{OwnerName} has already been revived by this effect.}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_GARDEN_POW: Whenever a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] is created, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_TACTICS_PO:
Whenever you [gold]Displace[/gold] with [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold], add {Amount} random card{Amount:plural:|s} into your hand. If the [gold]Distance[/gold] decreased, add {Amount:plural:an Attack|Attacks}.
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] increased, add {Amount:plural:a Skill|Skills}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SPIRIT_POWE: [font_size=18]Removed at the start of the third turn after being applied. [gold]Detonates[/gold] when removed, dealing attack damage (affected by modifiers) equal to double the [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] from the applying player to the target.

{Duration:plural:Start of next turn|After [blue]{Duration}[/blue] turns}, this [gold]Detonates[/gold].
When [gold]Detonated[/gold], Player {ApplierName} will attack {OwnerName} for [blue]{VengefulDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage.
At the end of your turn, attack the enemy with the lowest HP for damage (affected by modifiers) equal to [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold], then reduce it by 1.
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, attack the enemy with the lowest HP ([blue]{targetName}[/blue]) for [blue]{GuidedDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage, then reduce this by 1.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold], then halve it (rounding down).
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue], then halve this (rounding down).
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONELY_BOUND_SPIRIT_:
[font_size=18]Whenever [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are applied, [gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold]'s amount will increase by the same amount.
Can only be [gold]Detonated[/gold] by a card, dealing attack damage (affected by modifiers) equal to double its amount from the applying player to the target.
When detonated at the same time as [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold], effects that count the amount of [gold]Spirits Detonated[/gold] will count both [gold]Detonations[/gold].

Whenever [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are applied, [gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold]'s amount will increase by the same amount.
Deals attack damage equal to double its amount.
When [gold]Detonated[/gold], Player {ApplierName} will attack {OwnerName} for [blue]{VengefulDamage}[/blue] damage.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN_P: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FOREVER_CANCELLED_PO: Whenever [gold]Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold], apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] the [gold]Detonated[/gold] amount, rounded up, to the same enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOUND_SPIRITS_OF_EAR: At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on each enemy with [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] at the start of each turn.
Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ETHICALLY_SOURCED_BR: {TurnsRemaining:choose(0|1):Next turn, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()}.|Next turn, end your turn. The turn after that, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()}.|At the start of the next {TurnsRemaining} turns, end your turn. The turn after that, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()}.}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST_POWE: Next turn, choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] non-[gold]Basic[/gold] cards to return randomly into your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] non-[gold]Basic[/gold] cards to return randomly into your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Whenever you play a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold], add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Maul{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOLD_SARCOPHAGALLEY_: After [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn{Amount:plural:|s}, at the start of that turn, return [gold]{CardName}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE_NEXT_TURN_P: At the start of the turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-POSSESSED_ARMAMENT_P: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW_POWER:
At the start of your turn, if there {Amount:plural:is no [gold]Spider Lily[/gold]|are less than [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Spider Lilies[/gold]} in the [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold]|[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold]} to the [gold]Hand[/gold]{Amount:plural:.| until there are [blue]{Amount}[/blue].}
[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold] only give you one [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RECURSIVE_SOULS_POWE: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM_POWER:
Amplifies Distance bonuses.
Close: (1) Enemies take [blue]+{L1Mult}%[/blue] damage.
(2) Enemies take [blue]+{L2Mult}%[/blue] damage.
Far:(4) Enemies deal [blue]{L4Mult}%[/blue] damage.
(5) Enemies deal [blue]{L5Mult}%[/blue] damage.
Whenever you play a card:
If there's a card with the same name in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], you may add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. ([gold]{Value2}[/gold] uses left.)
If there's none, create a {Energy:energyIcons()} [gold]Clone[/gold] of it, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that [gold]Clone[/gold]. ([gold]{Value1}[/gold] uses left.)
Extinct Fauna of the Sanzu River
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EIKI_FREE_RELEASE_PO: You do not pay the [gold]Release[/gold] cost of cards.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LYCORIS_RADIATA_POWE: Increases damage and poison application of your Lycoris Radiata.
Your [gold]Lycoris Radiata[/gold] deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more damage and applies [green]{PoisonAmount}[/green] more [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_INVITATION_PO:
Whenever you would [gold]Release[/gold]:
- Deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies for every [gold]Guided Spirit[/gold] you would [gold]Release[/gold].
- [gold]Summon[/gold] and gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold] for every [gold]Divine Spirit[/gold] you would [gold]Release[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLOWER_VIEWING_POWER: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LILY_EMBRACE_POWER.s: Whenever you play a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and apply [green]{PoisonAmount}[/green] [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, add up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card{Amount:plural:|s} from the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile with an energy cost of [blue]1[/blue] or less to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is removed from combat when played.
Choose up to {Amount} card{Amount:plural:|s} to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {Amount:plural:It is|They are} removed from combat when played.
